basic_details.job_title: HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (HPSCDRC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C). Candidates with Bachelor's Degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through HPSCDRC official website hpconsumercommission.hp.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent from a University recognized by the Government of Himachal Pradesh., English Shorthand speed: 100 words per minute (W.P.M.), English Typing Speed: 40 words per minute (W.P.M.), Adequate knowledge of word processing on computer.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://hpconsumercommission.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
